name: astro-agent
description: > An AI-powered astrology assistant using real Swiss Ephemeris planetary calculations, LangGraph agent orchestration, and streaming conversational AI.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.eval: npx ts-node --project evals/tsconfig.json evals/runner.ts && npx ts-node --project evals/tsconfig.json evals/judge.ts && npx ts-node --project evals/tsconfig.json evals/validate_judge.ts
